query: أخبرني عن لحم تاجيما في محافظة هيوغو، أصل لحم كوبي.
reasoning: Query specifically asks about Tajima beef (但馬牛), the Hyogo cattle breed at the origin of Kobe beef. get_local_food returned 195 items but the visible content is Japan Heritage food stories (folk songs, Awaji island myths, northern shipping routes, kilns, Kanmon Strait) — none covering Tajima beef. Per RULE C, score 2 on intent (relevant entity class entirely absent, not merely incomplete scope). RULE B applied: single root cause is retrieval failure; practical_usefulness and specificity both score 1 as a result, but failure is logged once as category A. lang=ar was passed correctly; body_excerpts remain in Japanese which is likely a data-layer limitation, so constraint_handling scores 3 (partial).
missing_data: Tajima beef (但馬牛) GI or specialty record — Hyogo MAFF GI registration, breed origin history, link to Kobe beef designation, farms or restaurants in Tajima region (northern Hyogo). Arabic-language description of the breed.
improvement_hint: Ensure 但馬牛 appears as a MAFF GI or local-specialty record in Hyogo's food data; add a keyword-boost or canonical alias mapping tajima-gyu → Hyogo so get_local_food surfaces it when the prefecture is Hyogo and the query term is present. Also verify Arabic translations exist for key GI records.
